title: How to remove the dashed line at the bottom of automated emails? monday.com
excerpt: Automated emails sent through monday.com currently display an unwanted dashed line at the bottom. This dashed line appears consistently across all automated email communications, detracting from the professional appearan…

posts.author: Ruben2 (Ruben Kooijman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Automated emails sent through monday.com currently display an unwanted dashed line at the bottom. This dashed line appears consistently across all automated email communications, detracting from the professional appearance of the emails.

Issue Detail: ----------- Line on the bottom of the e-mails

Expected Outcome: Remove or disable the dashed line so automated emails have a cleaner and more professional appearance.

Scherm­afbeelding 2025-02-25 om 18.17.501308×612 33.4 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: My automatic emails don’t have that line. I’d recommend double checking the email signature as well as the automation that triggers the email.
